intel_overview.headline_zh: 欧洲IP体系深化整合与ADR机制崛起
intel_overview.headline_en: European IP Integration and ADR Mechanisms Rise
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧洲知识产权体系呈现深度整合与多元化争议解决并行的态势。摩尔多瓦加入EPO及UPC案件管理系统上线，标志着保护网络进一步扩张与效率提升。PMAC程序规则获批及亚马逊InterDigital仲裁和解，凸显替代性争议解决（ADR）在SEP纠纷中的战略地位。同时，欧盟法院在版权与商标领域的判决细化了权利边界，EUIPO推动手工艺地理标志落地，显示IP保护向传统领域延伸。整体而言，欧洲正构建更高效、覆盖更广且注重实务平衡的IP生态。
top_signals: UPC下属PMAC正式运行并促成重大SEP仲裁和解
摩尔多瓦成为EPO第40个成员国，保护版图东扩
欧盟法院裁定养老院内部转播不构成向公众传播
EUIPO注册首个欧盟级手工艺地理标志利摩日瓷器
cross_currents: 司法与仲裁双轨并行：UPC诉讼压力促使高价值SEP纠纷转向绑定仲裁，以降低管辖权冲突风险。
保护范围精细化：从数字版权边界厘清到手工艺GI确立，IP保护正从高科技向传统文化资产双向渗透。
行政与司法协同增强：EPO指南拟引用UPC判例，且EUIPO强化与成员国协作，旨在统一审查与执法标准。
implications: 中国企业在欧SEP许可谈判中应重视PMAC仲裁机制，将其作为规避多国诉讼风险的优选策略。
拥有传统工艺或文化产品的中国企业，可利用欧盟新设的手工艺地理标志体系进行品牌护城河构建。
需密切关注EPO审查指南修订及UPC判例引用趋势，提前调整专利撰写与异议应对策略以符合新标准。
watchlist: EPO 2027年指南中关于强制指明修改依据及引用UPC判例的具体实施细节
PMAC仲裁裁决在后续FRAND费率确定中的参考价值及执行效力

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC确立长臂管辖，EUIPO发布动态设计新规
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Long-Arm Jurisdiction Confirmed; EUIPO Dynamic Design Rules
daily_report.executive_line: UPC上诉法院确认对非成员国侵权的长臂管辖权，重塑跨境诉讼格局；EUIPO出台动画外观设计新指南，亚马逊与InterDigital转向仲裁和解FRAND纠纷...
daily_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP领域呈现司法扩张与规则细化并行的态势。UPC在柯达诉富士案中确立“长臂管辖”原则，极大扩展了其跨境执法能力，即便被告位于非UPC国家。与此同时，EUIPO发布欧盟外观设计改革指南，正式接纳MP4等动态格式，适应数字产品保护需求。在争议解决方面，亚马逊与InterDigital同意通过仲裁终结FRAND诉讼，反映出企业对UPC与英国法院管辖权冲突的规避倾向。此外，EPO将权利要求解释难题转介至扩大上诉委员会，可能引发专利审查标准的深层变动。

storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 反映大型科技企业倾向于通过仲裁高效解决SEP纠纷，避免多国诉讼的不确定性与高昂成本，预示争议解决模式转变。

report_items.summary_en: The European Patent Office participated in the 2026 UNION-IP Congress in Amsterdam, marking the association’s sixty-fifth anniversary. EPO Vice-President Steve Rowan delivered a keynote address emphasizing the role of high-quality patents in driving innovation and competitiveness. He highlighted the Unitary Patent system, noting it provides uniform protection across eighteen EU member states, covering approximately eighty percent of the EU’s GDP through a single request. The congress featured representatives from the EUIPO, CJEU, and WIPO, focusing on evolving international IP landscapes, disp...

Key institutional stakeholders addressed professional standards, confidentiality, and the importance of high-quality intellectual property rights.

report_items.title: Record-breaking surge in UK trade mark applications
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局数据显示，2026年3月新商标申请量达22,506件，创历史新高。其中本土申请20,173件，马德里国际申请2,333件。2025年全年申请量超20万件，较2019年几近翻倍。增长受4月1日费用上调前的抢注行为及脱欧后长期趋势共同驱动。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office recorded 22,506 trade mark applications in March 2026, a new monthly high comprising 20,173 domestic and 2,333 Madrid System filings. This surge continues a broader trend of increased demand, with annual volumes nearly doubling since 2019 to reach a record 203,195 in 2025. While the March spike likely reflects applicants filing ahead of fee increases effective 1 April 2026, monthly totals have consistently exceeded pre-2021 records since 2025. Year-to-date figures through April 2026 indicate continued strong activity, driven by factors including post-Brexit...
core_points_zh: 年3月英国商标申请总量达22,506件，创单月历史新高
年全年申请量逾20万件，较2019年增长近一倍
申请激增部分源于申请人规避2026年4月1日生效的费用上调
core_points_en: March 2026 saw a record 22,506 UK trade mark applications, including domestic and Madrid filings.
Annual filings nearly doubled since 2019, with 2025 reaching a historic high of 203,195 applications.
Fee increases effective 1 April 2026 likely influenced the March surge, alongside long-term growth trends.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The sustained rise in UK trade mark filings signals robust brand protection activity, transcending short-term reactions to fee adjustments. For rights holders, this volume suggests potential examination delays and necessitates strategic timing for new filings. Portfolio managers should anticipate longer processing times and consider early engagement with the UKIPO to mitigate backlog risks. Monitoring subsequent mont...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: High filing volumes indicate competitive brand landscapes, requiring proactive portfolio management and timely registration strategies.
Practice note: Anticipate potential examination delays due to increased workload; plan filing schedules to account for possible backlog effects.
What to monitor: Track post-April 2026 monthly filing rates to assess whether growth remains structural or reverts to pre-surge levels.

report_items.title_zh: 基因编辑伦理：比较欧洲专利公约与美国专利法
report_items.title_en: Comparing EPC Article 53(a) and US Patent Law in Gene Editing Ethics
report_items.title: Comparing EPC Article 53(a) and US patent law in gene editing ethics | Potter Clarkson
report_items.summary_zh: 本文比较了欧美在基因编辑专利伦理处理上的差异。美国专利法基本忽略道德考量，侧重技术创新；而欧洲依据《欧洲专利公约》第53(a)条，对涉及人类胚胎、生殖系修改等发明适用伦理排除。随着生物技术发展，道德排除已从理论概念转变为决定专利申请命运的实际问题，纯美式视角的申请在欧洲面临挑战。
report_items.summary_en: Morality-based exclusions in patent law have evolved from theoretical concepts to practical determinants in biotechnology, particularly for gene editing and stem cells. While US patent law has become largely ethically neutral, focusing on technical innovation, European practice under EPC Article 53(a) actively excludes inventions contrary to public policy or morality. This includes specific restrictions on human embryo use, germline modification, and animal suffering. Consequently, applications drafted solely with a US perspective may face unexpected examination hurdles in Europe. The divergen...
core_points_zh: 欧洲专利法依据EPC第53(a)条，对违背公共秩序或道德的发明（如人类胚胎使用）实行伦…
美国专利法趋向道德中立，除禁止涵盖“人类有机体”外，道德不作为拒绝专利的主要依据
仅基于美国视角撰写的生物技术专利申请，若未解决欧洲伦理考量，在欧洲审查中可能遭遇意外困难
core_points_en: EPC Article 53(a) applies ethical exclusions to gene editing, covering human embryos and germline modifications.
US patent law is largely ethically neutral, prioritizing technical criteria over moral utility doctrines.
Biotech applications drafted for the US market may fail European examination if ethical risks are unaddressed.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The structural divergence between US and European patent systems requires distinct drafting strategies for biotechnology portfolios. Applicants must proactively address EPC Article 53(a) ethical exclusions during preparation, as US-style specifications often lack necessary safeguards. Monitoring EPO case law on emerging gene-editing techniques is essential to anticipate shifting ethical boundaries and maintain viable...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Biotech applicants seeking parallel US and EP protection must recognize that ethical neutrality in the US does not translate to Europe, creating potential validi…
Practice note: Drafting teams should explicitly evaluate gene-editing claims against EPC Article 53(a) exclusions, such as human embryo use, rather than relying on US-centric tech…
What to monitor: Track EPO Board of Appeal decisions and Examination Guidelines updates regarding the ethical status of new gene-editing tools and germline modification techniques.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟外观设计改革：动画与动态设计新指南
report_items.title_en: EUIPO Issues New Guidance on Animated and Dynamic Designs for EU Reform
report_items.title: EU Design Reform: New Guidance on Animated and Dynamic Designs
report_items.summary_zh: EUIPO发布欧盟外观设计改革第二阶段实施指南，将于2026年7月1日生效。指南明确允许提交MP4格式动画及OBJ/STL格式CAD动态视图，以更好展示GUI及复杂曲面。静态视图上限增至10个，动态视图限1个且不可混用静态图。多项申请上限为50项设计。注册前后仅允许对非实质性细节进行修改。
report_items.summary_en: The EUIPO has released guidance for Phase 2 of the EU design reform, effective 1 July 2026. The update clarifies procedures for filing animated and dynamic representations, permitting MP4, OBJ, and STL formats alongside traditional static images. This change supports protection for digital products, graphical user interfaces, and items with moving parts. Applicants may now submit up to ten static views per design. Alternatively, a single dynamic view (maximum 20 MB) is permitted, though it cannot be combined with static views for the same design. These measures aim to reduce ambiguity and bett...
core_points_zh: 允许提交MP4动画及OBJ/STL动态视图，替代传统静态图片以展示复杂设计特征
静态视图每设计最多10个；若用动态视图则限1个（最大20MB）且不得补充静态图
多项申请接受最多50个设计（总文件200MB）；仅允许修改非实质性细节
core_points_en: EUIPO permits MP4, OBJ, and STL files for animated or dynamic design representations starting July 2026.
Static view limit increases to ten per design; dynamic filings allow one view up to 20 MB.
Dynamic and static representations are mutually exclusive for individual designs, preventing mixed format submissions.
report_items.insight_zh: 新规适应数字产品保护需求，通过引入动态文件格式提升设计表达完整性。申请人需关注文件格式限制及视图互斥规则，特别是GUI及运动部件产品的申请策略调整。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance modernizes EU design practice by accommodating digital and mechanical complexity through dynamic file formats. Rights holders should note the mutual exclusivity rule between static and dynamic views, which requires strategic selection based on the design's key visual features. The increased static view count aids complex geometric disclosures, while dynamic options benefit GUIs and moving parts. Practit...
insight_points_zh: 动态文件格式（MP4/OBJ/STL）的引入显著提升了对GUI及复杂几何形状的保护清晰度
需注意动态视图与静态视图的互斥规则，以及单项动态视图20MB的文件大小限制
修正案仅限于非实质性细节，企业在提交前仍需严格审核设计表达的准确性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced representation options support clearer protection for GUIs, digital interfaces, and products with moving or transitional mechanical features.
Practice note: Applicants must choose between static (up to 10 views) or dynamic (one file) formats per design, as mixing is prohibited.
What to monitor: Technical compliance with new file format specifications and size limits ahead of the 1 July 2026 implementation date.

report_items.title_zh: 柯达诉富士：上诉法院确认UPC长臂管辖权
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Confirms Long-Arm Jurisdiction in Kodak v FujiFilm
report_items.title: Kodak v FujiFilm: the Court of Appeal confirms UPC’s long-arm jurisdiction | Potter Clarkson
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在柯达诉富士胶片案中发布详细指引，确认UPC具有域外管辖权。尽管因缺乏侵权证据驳回了针对英国和德国的侵权主张，但法院明确保留了对指定在非UPC领土生效的欧洲专利案件的管辖权，前提是被告住所位于UPC成员国境内。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal has clarified the court’s extra-territorial reach, confirming jurisdiction extends to European patents validated in non-UPC territories when the defendant is domiciled within a UPC Member State. Overturning the first-instance decision on evidentiary grounds rather than jurisdictional ones, the judgment preserves the court’s authority over such claims. The ruling aligns with CJEU precedent, establishing that the UPC cannot decline jurisdiction in favor of non-UPC forums if domicile-based jurisdiction applies. This decision provides critical guidance on the distinction be...
core_points_zh: UPC上诉法院确认，依据UPCA第34条，其管辖权不限于UPC领土，涵盖所有欧洲专利生…
若被告住所位于UPC领土，法院不得以非UPC法院为更适当论坛为由，拒绝行使对非UPC领…
本案因缺乏侵权证据而非管辖权原因，导致针对英国和德国的侵权主张被驳回，但管辖权原则得以…
core_points_en: UPC jurisdiction extends to non-UPC territories if the defendant is domiciled in a UPC Member State.
The Court cannot decline jurisdiction based on forum non conveniens when domicile establishes competence under Brussels I bis.
Infringement claims failed due to lack of evidence, not because the Court lacked jurisdictional authority.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment confirms that UPC proceedings can impact patent validity and infringement findings beyond the UPC territory, contingent on defendant domicile. Rights holders should recognize that defending or asserting patents in the UPC may trigger broader territorial consequences. The distinction between jurisdictional existence and its exercise offers procedural nuance for complex multi-jurisdictional disputes invol...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Defendants domiciled in UPC states face potential litigation exposure for patents validated in non-UPC countries like the UK.
Practice note: Legal teams must distinguish between the Court's jurisdictional reach and its discretionary exercise when framing cross-border defense strategies.
What to monitor: Future applications of this principle in cases involving multiple defendants or complex corporate structures across UPC and non-UPC borders.

report_items.title_en: Amazon and InterDigital to Resolve FRAND Dispute via Binding Arbitration
report_items.title: Amazon and InterDigital will settle their FRAND dispute through arbitration
report_items.summary_zh: InterDigital与亚马逊已达成协议，终止双方所有未决诉讼，并通过具有约束力的仲裁确定新许可协议的最终条款。该和解标志着过去一年来最激烈的全球标准必要专利（SEP）争端之一显著降温。此前，自2025年9月起，该争议升级为英国高等法院与统一专利法院（UPC）之间的管辖权冲突，备受全球专利界关注。
report_items.summary_en: InterDigital and Amazon have agreed to resolve all pending civil litigation concerning standard-essential patents for Amazon services, including Prime Video. The parties will enter binding arbitration to determine the final terms of a new licensing agreement. This settlement marks a significant de-escalation in a high-profile global dispute that had intensified since September 2025. The conflict previously involved complex jurisdictional tensions between the UK High Court and the Unified Patent Court. While the forum for arbitration is not definitively confirmed, reports suggest the Patent Mar...
core_points_zh: 双方同意终止所有未决民事诉讼，转而通过绑定仲裁确定新协议条款
争议曾升级为英国高等法院与统一专利法院（UPC）间的管辖权冲突
PMAC（专利市场仲裁中心）可能不会被选为此次仲裁的论坛机构
core_points_en: Parties agree to end all pending civil litigation and submit to binding arbitration for new license terms.
Settlement resolves jurisdictional conflict between the UK High Court and the Unified Patent Court.
Patent Market Arbitration Center is reportedly unlikely to serve as the forum for these proceedings.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This shift to arbitration highlights a strategic preference for confidential resolution over public precedent in cross-border SEP disputes. For rights holders and implementers, it removes immediate uncertainty from parallel UPC and UK proceedings but limits transparency on FRAND benchmarks. Practitioners should note the growing viability of arbitration as a tool to bypass fragmented national litigation landscapes.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Arbitration offers a unified, confidential path to resolve multi-jurisdictional SEP conflicts, avoiding prolonged parallel litigation in the UK and UPC.
Practice note: Choosing arbitration over court determinations prevents the establishment of public FRAND precedents, impacting future benchmarking strategies for similar portfolio…
What to monitor: Observe whether this settlement influences other major SEP holders to prefer private arbitration amid ongoing UPC and UK jurisdictional competition.

report_items.title_zh: 理查德·米德调任英国上诉法院
report_items.title_en: Richard Meade Appointed to UK Court of Appeal for Patent Cases
report_items.title: Richard Meade moves to UK Court of Appeal
report_items.summary_zh: 英国政府宣布七名法官晋升至上诉法院，其中包括理查德·米德。米德曾在英国专利法院留下深刻印记。在上诉法院，他将在专利案件中与理查德·阿诺德和科林·伯斯共事。
report_items.summary_en: The British government has announced the promotion of seven judges to the Court of Appeal, including Richard Meade. Known for his significant contributions to the UK patent courts, Meade will now adjudicate patent appeals alongside existing senior judges Richard Arnold and Colin Birss. This appointment consolidates a specialized bench for intellectual property disputes at the appellate level in England and Wales. The move ensures continuity in judicial expertise for complex technical and legal issues arising from lower court patent decisions.
core_points_zh: 英国政府宣布理查德·米德等七名法官晋升至上诉法院
米德将在上诉法院专利案件中与阿诺德和伯斯法官共事
core_points_en: Richard Meade is promoted to the UK Court of Appeal among seven new appointees.
Meade will hear patent cases alongside Judges Richard Arnold and Colin Birss.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This appointment reinforces the specialization of the UK appellate bench for patent matters. Rights holders should note the continued presence of experienced jurists in handling complex IP appeals. The composition of this panel may influence the consistency of precedent and the interpretation of patent law standards in future high-stakes litigation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties appealing patent decisions will face a bench with deep specialized experience in IP law.
Practice note: The trio of Meade, Arnold, and Birss suggests a stable, expert-driven approach to appellate patent review.
What to monitor: Observe how Judge Meade’s prior rulings inform his appellate reasoning and interaction with co-judges.

This procedural development indicates that the Enlarged Board will provide clarification on how descriptive elements influence the scope of patent protection. The source material confirms the referral but does not detail the specific legal arguments or the fina...
core_points_zh: EPO技术上诉委员会3.3.05将权利要求解释的根本问题转介至扩大上诉委员会

案件核心关注点在于说明书在权利要求解释过程中所起的作用

Pending case G 1/26 concerns the role of the description in interpreting patent claims.
The referral involves the technical subject matter of coated steel strips.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。

Rights holders should monitor G 1/26 for guidance on interpretive standards. The outcome may affect how patents are drafted and assessed for clarity and scope, necessitating close attention to future Enlarged Board decisions.

Practice note: Drafting teams should note the pending referral when aligning description content with claim language.
What to monitor: Track the publication of the Enlarged Board’s written reasons and any scheduled oral proceedings.

report_items.title: Diabetes Awareness Week: Are We Getting Closer To A Cure?
report_items.summary_zh: 为纪念英国糖尿病意识周，本文探讨革新治疗的创新技术及知识产权在药物和医疗器械开发中的作用。文章回顾胰岛素专利历史，指出当前研究正转向恢复胰岛素生产的根治性疗法，并讨论企业如何通过专利策略保持市场地位。
report_items.summary_en: Marking UK Diabetes Awareness Week, this analysis examines innovations revolutionizing diabetes treatment and the role of intellectual property in developing medicines and medical devices. It reviews the historical context of insulin patents and recent scientific advances, including short- and long-acting insulin analogues. The article highlights how companies can maintain strong market positions through effective patent strategies amidst rising global prevalence. While current management relies on insulin therapy, research continues toward curative approaches. The piece underscores the import...
core_points_zh: 文章旨在探讨知识产权在糖尿病药物及器械开发中的作用
强调企业需通过专利策略确保在糖尿病治疗市场的强势地位
提及早期胰岛素专利以1美元出售的历史及现代类似物进展
core_points_en: The article reviews the historical sale of early insulin patents and subsequent development of synthetic insulin analogues.
It emphasizes the strategic role of intellectual property in securing market position for diabetes treatments and devices.
Rising global diabetes prevalence drives continued innovation in both management therapies and potential curative research avenues.
report_items.insight_zh: Practice note / What to monitor: 原文仅提出将讨论专利策略的重要性，但未提供具体策略细节、案例或法律分析。需关注后续是否发布关于糖尿病领域专利布局的具体实务指南或市场分析，目前仅能确认该领域IP关注度提升。
report_items.insight_en: This overview highlights the intersection of medical innovation and IP strategy in diabetes care. For rights holders, it reinforces the need for robust patent portfolios around both established therapies and emerging curative technologies. Practitioners should note the continued relevance of historical precedents in shaping current commercialization strategies within this high-volume therapeutic area.
insight_points_zh: 原文未提供具体的专利策略建议或市场数据支持
需观察后续内容是否涉及具体的专利申请趋势或侵权风险
目前仅能确认知识产权在糖尿病研发中的角色被业界关注
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Companies developing diabetes treatments must align R&D efforts with comprehensive IP strategies to protect market share in a growing sector.
Practice note: The discussion links historical patent practices with modern analogue developments, illustrating the long-term value of foundational IP assets.
What to monitor: Watch for further detailed guidance on specific patent filing tactics or enforcement trends in the diabetes device and pharmaceutical markets.

weekly_report.executive_line: UPC上诉法院确认对非成员国专利的长臂管辖权，显著扩大诉讼风险半径；欧盟外观设计新规允许动态视图提交，提升数字资产保护精度。

He is recognized for developing the Modular Multilevel Converter (MMC), a technology now considered a global standard in power electronics and grid infrastructure. The MMC’s modular architecture enables efficient, high-power transmission at the gigawatt scale by eliminating bulky output filters and reducing harmonic distortion. This innovation facilitates connecting distant renewable energy sources to population centers while maintaining grid stability...

The EPO will announce remaining 2026 European Inventor Award winners during the ceremony on 2 July.

report_items.title: Record-breaking surge in UK trade mark applications
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局数据显示，2026年3月新商标申请量达22,506件，创历史新高。其中本土申请20,173件，马德里国际申请2,333件。2025年全年申请量超20万件，较2019年几近翻倍。增长受4月1日费用上调前的抢注行为及脱欧后长期趋势共同驱动。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office recorded 22,506 trade mark applications in March 2026, a new monthly high comprising 20,173 domestic and 2,333 Madrid System filings. This surge continues a broader trend of increased demand, with annual volumes nearly doubling since 2019 to reach a record 203,195 in 2025. While the March spike likely reflects applicants filing ahead of fee increases effective 1 April 2026, monthly totals have consistently exceeded pre-2021 records since 2025. Year-to-date figures through April 2026 indicate continued strong activity, driven by factors including post-Brexit...
core_points_zh: 年3月英国商标申请总量达22,506件，创单月历史新高
年全年申请量逾20万件，较2019年增长近一倍
申请激增部分源于申请人规避2026年4月1日生效的费用上调
core_points_en: March 2026 saw a record 22,506 UK trade mark applications, including domestic and Madrid filings.
Annual filings nearly doubled since 2019, with 2025 reaching a historic high of 203,195 applications.
Fee increases effective 1 April 2026 likely influenced the March surge, alongside long-term growth trends.

For rights holders, this volume suggests potential examination delays and necessitates strategic timing for new filings. Portfolio managers should anticipate longer processing times and consider early engagement with the UKIPO to mitigate backlog risks. Monitoring subsequent mont...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: High filing volumes indicate competitive brand landscapes, requiring proactive portfolio management and timely registration strategies.
Practice note: Anticipate potential examination delays due to increased workload; plan filing schedules to account for possible backlog effects.
What to monitor: Track post-April 2026 monthly filing rates to assess whether growth remains structural or reverts to pre-surge levels.

report_items.title: European Union Trademark: A Malta Perspective
report_items.summary_zh: 马耳他提供国家注册与欧盟商标（EUTM）双轨保护。EUTM依据第2017/1001号条例，通过单一申请覆盖27个欧盟成员国，具有成本效益。马耳他作为英语司法管辖区，有利于知识产权组合管理。文章回顾了从共同体商标到EUTM的法律演变，并分析了单一注册、统一续展及语言优势等实务要点。
report_items.summary_en: Malta offers dual trademark protection pathways through national registration or the European Union Trademark (EUTM) system. Governed by Regulation (EU) 2017/1001, the EUTM framework replaces the former Community Trademark regime, providing cost-effective coverage across twenty-seven EU member states via a single application. This analysis highlights Malta’s role as an English-speaking jurisdiction within the EU, facilitating streamlined IP portfolio management and cross-border structuring for international businesses. The EUTM mechanism simplifies administrative burdens by consolidating regis...
core_points_zh: 马耳他企业可选择马耳他知识产权局国内注册或EUIPO的欧盟商标注册两条路径
EUTM框架由第2017/1001号条例管辖，取代原共同体商标制度，覆盖27个欧盟国家
EUTM优势包括单一申请表、统一续展日、无需提交使用声明及跨成员国承认使用效力
core_points_en: Applicants may choose between national Maltese registration or the broader European Union Trademark protection route.
Regulation (EU) 2017/1001 governs the EUTM system, covering twenty-seven EU countries through one application.
EUTM registration offers unified renewal dates and simplified administrative processes compared to multiple national filings.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，马耳他后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This analysis underscores the operational efficiency of the EUTM system for rights holders managing pan-European brands. By leveraging Malta’s English-language legal environment, companies can streamline portfolio administration. The shift from national to unitary rights reduces fragmentation, though applicants must balance broad coverage against the risk of central refusal affecting all designated territories.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: EUTM registration provides a centralized, cost-efficient mechanism for securing brand protection across twenty-seven EU markets simultaneously.
Practice note: Utilizing English as the filing language simplifies communication with the EUIPO, while Malta’s jurisdiction offers strategic advantages for IP structuring.
What to monitor: Ongoing adaptations of EU trademark law to digital commercial environments and their impact on enforcement and registration clarity.

report_items.title_zh: 基因编辑伦理：比较欧洲专利公约与美国专利法
report_items.title_en: Comparing EPC Article 53(a) and US Patent Law in Gene Editing Ethics
report_items.title: Comparing EPC Article 53(a) and US patent law in gene editing ethics | Potter Clarkson
report_items.summary_zh: 本文比较了欧美在基因编辑专利伦理处理上的差异。美国专利法基本忽略道德考量，侧重技术创新；而欧洲依据《欧洲专利公约》第53(a)条，对涉及人类胚胎、生殖系修改等发明适用伦理排除。随着生物技术发展，道德排除已从理论概念转变为决定专利申请命运的实际问题，纯美式视角的申请在欧洲面临挑战。
report_items.summary_en: Morality-based exclusions in patent law have evolved from theoretical concepts to practical determinants in biotechnology, particularly for gene editing and stem cells. While US patent law has become largely ethically neutral, focusing on technical innovation, European practice under EPC Article 53(a) actively excludes inventions contrary to public policy or morality. This includes specific restrictions on human embryo use, germline modification, and animal suffering. Consequently, applications drafted solely with a US perspective may face unexpected examination hurdles in Europe. The divergen...
core_points_zh: 欧洲专利法依据EPC第53(a)条，对违背公共秩序或道德的发明（如人类胚胎使用）实行伦…
美国专利法趋向道德中立，除禁止涵盖“人类有机体”外，道德不作为拒绝专利的主要依据
仅基于美国视角撰写的生物技术专利申请，若未解决欧洲伦理考量，在欧洲审查中可能遭遇意外困难
core_points_en: EPC Article 53(a) applies ethical exclusions to gene editing, covering human embryos and germline modifications.
US patent law is largely ethically neutral, prioritizing technical criteria over moral utility doctrines.

weekly_report.executive_line_en: The UPC expands cross-border litigation risk via long-arm jurisdiction, while EUIPO modernizes design protection for digital assets. UK trademark filings surge amid fee changes.
weekly_report.summary_en: This week, the European IP landscape shifted through judicial expansion and regulatory modernization. The UPC Court of Appeal confirmed long-arm jurisdiction in Kodak v FujiFilm, asserting authority over European patents validated in non-UPC states when defendants are domiciled within the UPC territory. Simultaneously, the EUIPO released Phase 2 guidance for the EU design reform, effective July 1, permitting MP4 and OBJ formats for dynamic designs to better protect GUIs and digital interfaces. In the UK, trademark applications hit a record high in March 2026, driven by anticipated fee increases, prompting UKIPO to launch a Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support commercialization. The EPO highlighted ethical divergences in gene editing between Europe and the US, while referring case G1/26 to clarify claim interpretation. Additionally, Amazon and InterDigital agreed to resolve their FRAND dispute via binding arbitration, signaling a shift toward private resolution mechanisms for complex SEP conflicts.

topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）运行趋于成熟。PMAC调解仲裁中心正式运营，为FRAND等争议提供非诉路径。杜塞尔多夫等核心分院扩容以应对案件增长。判例法在权利要求解释、证据披露及间接侵权认定上日益明确。中国首次跻身EPO申请来源前三，需高度适应UPC高效诉讼节奏与严格程序规则，优化在欧IP布局与维权策略。
key_points: PMAC中心上线：提供调解仲裁服务，降低维权成本，特别适用于SEP/FRAND纠纷解决。
判例规则明晰：米兰分院确立审查档案限制权利要求范围；杜塞尔多夫分院细化间接侵权与证据规则。
中国地位提升：中国首次进入EPO申请来源国前三，统一专利在中小企业中采纳率显著增长。
actions: 利用PMAC机制：针对许可谈判僵局或FRAND争议，优先评估通过PMAC进行调解或仲裁的可能性。
严控诉讼程序：在UPC诉讼中严格执行证据前置披露，避免迟交证据被排除；保持授权陈述与诉讼主张一致。
优化权利要求：审慎使用功能性限定，警惕单一组件被认定为直接侵权，提前布局防御性从属权利要求。

topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) system reached operational maturity with the formal launch of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC). This new body provides structured alternative dispute resolution pathways, particularly for FRAND and SEP conflicts. Concurrently, core local divisions such as Düsseldorf expanded capacity to manage rising caseloads. Jurisprudence has grown more predictable, with key rulings clarifying claim interpretation limits via prosecution history estoppel and refining standards for indirect infringement and evidence disclosure. As China rises to become a top-three source of EPO filings, applicants must adapt to the UPC’s accelerated procedural timelines. Strategic alignment of European IP portfolios with these evolving litigation and ADR mechanisms is now critical for effective rights enforcement and risk management.

topics.headline_en: UPC PMAC Launch and Escalating SEP Jurisdiction Conflicts
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，UPC专利调解仲裁中心正式启用，为FRAND纠纷提供ADR新路径。与此同时，中英法院在ZTE诉三星等案中作出冲突的全球费率判决，禁诉令博弈升级。英国推进SEP改革并确立非FRAND因素考量，欧盟更新TTBER指南。司法碎片化与管辖权争夺成为核心风险，企业需应对多重法律环境挑战。
key_points: UPC专利调解与仲裁中心(PMAC)于2026年6月启用，重点解决SEP及FRAND许可纠纷，形成诉讼与ADR并行机制。
中英法院就同一SEP案件作出相互冲突的全球FRAND费率判决，禁诉令与反禁诉令博弈激烈，管辖权冲突常态化。
英国推动SEP监管改革，法院在费率裁定中引入“非FRAND因素”；欧盟修订TTBER，强化专利池与集体谈判合规指引。
actions: 收到侵权通知后立即书面表达许可意愿以保留抗辩权，并审查许可协议中关于退出UPC管辖的决策权归属。
建立中欧双轨应诉策略，预判禁诉令风险，避免在中国申请临时许可时触发欧洲法院的反制措施。
依据新版TTBER指南重新评估专利池参与及集体谈判策略，确保SEP许可协议符合欧盟反垄断合规要求。
watchlist: 英国IPO即将发布的SEP改革政策细则及其对全球许可定价的影响。
UPC上诉法院在Amazon v InterDigital等案中关于禁诉令与临时许可的进一步裁决口径。
欧盟委员会针对汽车及流媒体行业SEP许可谈判组的反垄断执法动态。

insight_cards.insight_zh: 许可动作已经从背景变量变成当前主线，说明专利池扩围、费率博弈和双边谈判正在持续抬高经营准备门槛。
insight_cards.insight_en: Licensing has moved from a background factor to the main storyline, showing pools, rate-setting, and bilateral talks are raising the preparation bar.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先把许可覆盖、费率对标和 willing licensee 证据准备前置。
insight_cards.action_en: Front-load licence coverage checks, rate benchmarking, and willing-licensee evidence.

insight_cards.insight_en: Europe-wide is the busiest forum in the recent window, with United Kingdom close behind, pointing to multi-forum spillover.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先盯住 欧洲层面 的裁判与程序变化，并同步观察外溢到其他法域的连锁影响。

insight_cards.action_zh: 把许可准备、诉讼预案和客户交付协同放到同一张经营清单里，不要只按单案应对。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) officially commenced operations in June 2026, offering a new alternative dispute resolution pathway for FRAND licensing disputes. Concurrently, jurisdictional tensions have intensified as Chinese and UK courts issued conflicting global FRAND rate determinations in cases such as ZTE v Samsung, escalating anti-suit injunction battles. The UK is advancing SEP regulatory reforms that incorporate non-FRAND factors into rate assessments, while the EU has updated its Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation guidelines to strengthen compliance standards for patent pools. This judicial fragmentation and active jurisdictional competition present significant risks for multinational entities. Stakeholders must navigate these diverging legal environments by adapting litigation strategies and ensuring robust antitrust comp...
key_points_en: The UPC PMAC launched in June 2026, establishing a parallel mechanism for resolving SEP and FRAND disputes through mediation and arbitration alongside traditional litigation.
Conflicting global FRAND rulings from Chinese and UK courts have normalized jurisdictional clashes, intensifying the use of anti-suit and anti-anti-suit injunctions.
UK SEP reforms now consider non-FRAND factors in rate setting, while updated EU TTBER guidelines impose stricter antitrust compliance requirements on patent pools.
actions_en: Promptly express willingness to license in writing upon receiving infringement notices to preserve defenses, and clarify contractual authority for UPC opt-out decisions.
Develop dual-track litigation strategies for Europe and China to mitigate anti-suit injunction risks, avoiding triggers for counter-measures when seeking interim licenses.
Reassess patent pool participation and collective negotiation tactics against the revised EU TTBER guidelines to ensure full antitrust compliance in SEP licensing.
watchlist_en: Detailed implementation rules of the UK IPO’s SEP reform policy and their subsequent impact on global licensing valuation models.
Precedents set by the UPC Court of Appeal regarding anti-suit injunctions and interim licensing in key cases such as Amazon v InterDigital.
Antitrust enforcement actions by the European Commission targeting SEP licensing negotiations within the automotive and streaming media sectors.

topics.headline_zh: EUIPO执法趋严与权利边界重塑
topics.headline_en: EUIPO Tightens Enforcement and Redefines Trademark Rights Boundaries
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，EUIPO强化跨机构执法协作，重点打击药品及网络假冒。司法层面明确脱欧后英国未注册商标失效，并收紧名人姓名注册标准。同时，手工艺地理标志新制度落地，DesignView升级全球检索。中国企业需警惕执法风险，优化欧盟商标布局，并利用数字工具加强外观设计与品牌合规管理。
key_points: 执法协同升级：EUIPO联合欧盟委员会、Eurojust开展SHIELD VI等行动，严打药品及在线假冒，推广IPEP数字执法工具。
确权规则收紧：法院裁定脱欧过渡期后纯英国在先权利无效；名人姓名若被视为内容描述而非来源标识，将被拒绝注册。
制度工具革新：手工艺/工业产品地理标志（CIGI）进入过渡实施期；DesignView成为全球最大外观图像搜索引擎，提升检索透明度。
actions: 排查英国权利风险：复核依赖英国未注册商标阻碍欧盟注册的策略，确保在欧盟境内有独立有效的在先权利基础。
优化品牌注册策略：避免直接注册名人姓名或描述性词汇；利用SME基金补贴降低欧盟商标申请成本，实现27国覆盖。
加强外观与防伪合规：利用DesignView进行侵权比对自查；建立供应链溯源体系，应对欧盟针对药品及高科技产品的严厉海关查验。
watchlist: CIGI过渡期截止动态：关注2026年12月2日前成员国向欧盟新地理标志制度的转换进度及具体操作指南。
在线侵权治理新规：追踪EUIPO与欧盟委员会联合打击网络盗版后的配套平台责任界定及数据共享机制变化。
判例法适用口径：观察普通法院关于“Obelix”案后，对驰名商标跨类保护及声誉评估证据标准的后续司法实践倾向。
topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the EUIPO intensified cross-agency enforcement collaboration, targeting pharmaceutical counterfeits and online infringement through initiatives like Operation SHIELD VI. Judicial developments clarified that UK unregistered rights cannot support EU trademark oppositions post-Brexit transition, while courts imposed stricter standards for registering celebrity names. Simultaneously, the new geographical indication system for craft and industrial products entered its transitional implementation phase, and DesignView expanded into the world’s largest global design image search engine. Rights holders must reassess reliance on UK-based prior rights, optimize EU trademark portfolios to avoid descriptive or celebrity-related refusals, and leverage enhanced digital tools for design clearance and supply chain compliance amidst heightened customs scrutiny.
key_points_en: Enforcement coordination escalated via Operation SHIELD VI and IPEP digital tools, focusing on seizing counterfeit medicines and disrupting online illicit sales networks.
Legal certainty tightened as courts ruled UK-only rights ineffective for EU oppositions post-transition and rejected celebrity names lacking distinct source-identifying function.
Systemic tools evolved with the Craft and Industrial Geographical Indications regime entering transition and DesignView becoming the premier global design image search platform.
actions_en: Audit portfolio strategies relying on UK unregistered rights to ensure independent, valid earlier rights exist within the EU for future opposition or invalidity actions.
Refine brand registration approaches by avoiding purely descriptive or celebrity-associated marks, while utilizing SME funds to secure cost-effective EU-wide trademark coverage.
Implement rigorous design clearance using DesignView’s expanded image search and establish robust supply chain traceability to mitigate risks from intensified customs enforcement.
watchlist_en: Monitor the December 2026 deadline for converting national craft geographical indications to the new EU unitary system and associated procedural guidelines.
Track evolving platform liability standards and data-sharing mechanisms resulting from joint EUIPO and European Commission actions against online piracy.
Observe judicial trends following the Obelix ruling regarding evidence standards for reputation assessment and cross-class protection of well-known trademarks.

topics.headline_zh: 欧英强化IP犯罪协同执法
topics.headline_en: EU and UK Intensify Cross-Border Enforcement Against IP Crime
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧盟与英国显著升级假冒打击力度。EUIPO联合欧盟委员会、Eurojust深化跨机构协作，聚焦药品及网络盗版；英国延长IP犯罪部门资金至2029年并拟扩编，重点监管二手平台。执法呈现刑事化、跨境协同及全渠道覆盖趋势，中企需警惕供应链合规风险及新兴渠道侵权指控。
key_points: 欧盟层面：EUIPO联合欧委会及Eurojust，通过SHIELD VI等行动强化药品、网络盗版及有组织犯罪的跨境刑事协作。
英国动态：UKIPO获政府持续资助至2029年并计划扩编执法部门，重点发布二手时尚平台反假货指南，监管延伸至C2C领域。
执法趋势：从单一民事维权转向“行政+刑事”综合治理，强调公众沟通与消费者教育，执法覆盖面向线上及二手市场拓展。
actions: 建立出口产品全流程溯源体系，保留完整供应链凭证，以应对潜在的假冒关联指控或刑事调查。
将Vinted等二手交易平台纳入品牌监测范围，制定针对转售市场的快速投诉与鉴真响应机制。
加强欧洲当地法律顾问联络，密切关注EMPACT框架下的执法优先事项变化，提前布局合规防御。
watchlist: 欧盟后续针对网络盗版及假冒药品的具体配套法规或执法口径细化。
英国IP犯罪部门扩编后的具体职能范围调整及2029年前执法案件数据变化。
EUIPO与成员国当局在在线平台责任认定及数据共享方面的协作新动态。
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the European Union and the United Kingdom significantly escalated enforcement actions against intellectual property crime. The EUIPO, in collaboration with the European Commission and Eurojust, strengthened cross-border criminal cooperation through initiatives like Operation SHIELD VI, targeting counterfeit medicines and online piracy. Concurrently, the UK government extended funding for its specialist IP Crime Unit until 2029 and signaled plans for expansion, while issuing new guidance on counterfeit risks in secondary fashion markets. These developments reflect a broader strategic shift toward integrated administrative and criminal enforcement, with increased focus on digital platforms and consumer education.
